days.title: It Starts With Zeal
days.scripture: Do not be slothful in zeal, be fervent in spirit, serve the Lord.
days.body:
Do you remember when you first started in the faith? Everything looked so easy. It was easy to pray. It was easy to study God's Word. It was easy to evangelize. It was easy to do the things of God.

Yes, when we all started in the faith, it was an exciting journey for all of us. We were full of great hopes and expectations for what the Lord was going to do with us. Well, it will interest you to know that all these experiences did not come from you. You didn't manufacture your desire for the Lord. The zeal of the Spirit did!

This zeal refers to passion and desire. It is the work of the Lord inside of you to want to serve Him and live for Him. Without zeal, the Christian faith will be nothing to find interest in.

Although we start all passionate for the Lord and full of zeal, it will interest you to know that this zeal is not the only thing that can sustain you on this path. It is okay to start your journey with zeal, but it is not enough to continue with the same zeal. Why is this so? We will look at this more in tomorrow's article.
prayerPoints: Dear Lord zeal for your house has consumed me. I rise above any limitation of this world. Thank you for the salvation of men and thank you for the zeal I have for you.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Spend time meditating on today's article over and over again. Think about how ardent your zeal is.

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Ardent: a burning intense devotion

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: There is a burning desire to see the passions of the Lord come to pass, it's a consuming zeal beyond emotions-Ps Elliot

days.title: From Zeal to Responsibility
days.scripture: Therefore, my beloved, as you have always obeyed, so now, not only as in my presence but much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling, [13] for it is God who works in you, both to will and to work for his good pleasure.
days.body:
After some years in the faith, you would realise that keeping your faith is not automatic. It's something you need to be intentional about. You don't just get up to pray because you feel like it. You don't go to church because you want to, nor do you win souls because you feel the presence of God over you. As you mature in the faith, you will realise that it is not about what you feel like doing. It is about the call and responsibility that God has placed on you.

Even as young as you are, you must take responsibility for your faith. It is no longer God going to push you to pray or study the Word. You should learn to take your faith walk into your own hands. That's true maturity- where you move from zeal to responsibility.

Young ancient, your walk with God is in your hands! Your faith life is yours to nurture. Don't leave it to chance. Because if you do, you will retrogress and backslide. Learn to pray because you have understood prayer and its essence. Learn to meditate because you know the true place of meditation. Learn to evangelise because you know that the Master commissioned you to. By this, you will mature beyond your wildest imagination. Hallelujah
prayerPoints: Today, spend time to pray and examine why you do the things you do. Is it out of just zeal? Can you understand that it's now your responsibility to carry out what the Lord will have you do? Speak in tongues fervently.

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Retrogress: to move backwards on something or on a path

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: True maturity is when you realize that responsibility is the final destination of zeal-Ps Elliot

days.title: Keeping Your Zeal
days.scripture: Calling ten of his servants, he gave them ten minas, and said to them, ‘Engage in business until I come.’
days.body:
As we shared yesterday, it all depends on you. Young Ancient, to keep on in this faith, your Pastor or cell leader cannot do this for you. You must take charge of your zeal. If someone should look at you ten years from now, he or she should know that you are as zealous as you were ten years back and even greater.

It all begins by making up your mind and being intentional about the things of God. You must know that once you start this journey, there is no turning back. That's how to be responsible in your faith. You must know why you started, know the terms and conditions for this life. As Jesus Himself said, count the cost and know what you're getting yourself into. That is the way to keep your fire burning.

You should learn to also have testimonies of your victory in the faith. That is what will keep you motivated and in step with your purpose in Christ. Remember all the great victories Christ wrought in your life, hold on to them and then you will run and not faint.
prayerPoints: Today, spend time speaking in tongues fervidly. Declare that you are urgent even more.

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Fervid: intensely passionate

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: You need to have an enduring vision for your walk in Christ. - Ps Elliot

days.title: Zeal to Make a Fire
days.scripture: Remember, the fire must be kept burning on the altar at all times. It must never go out.
days.body:
Check out the scripture above again. This scripture is part of the instructions given to the Israelites regarding the burnt offerings and the maintenance of the altar fire in the Tabernacle. These instructions were given to Moses by God.

What do you think was so important about this fire that God gave a clear instruction that it should be kept burning always and *MUST NOT* go out? This was fire on His altar, and it had to keep burning to represent an endless sign in God's presence.

This is the same for all of us who call on the name of the Lord to keep our fires burning on the altar till He returns. This fire represents the zeal and passion towards God, in the bid of rendering our services to God. Paul the Apostle endears us to 'not be slothful but fervent in Spirit serving the Lord' (Check out Romans 12:11).

There are many teens who break down on their faith journeys, they experience these breakdowns as a result of weariness, trials and distractions and as a result turn to lose their fire and grow cold or at best lukewarm. This kind of attitude cannot and will not survive anyone as we approach the most crucial times of the age.

It is for this reason we are admonished by the Apostle to be 'instant in season and out of season'. (2 Timothy 4:2)Our fires must be turned on at all times, always burning before the Lord, causing us to be zealous for Him at all times. There must be no room given for compromise or any middle-stance.

This is only going to be possible for as long as we stay in the Lord's presence in fellowship and continuous labor of love: by this we are pruned from every distraction or weariness as times of refreshing come from the presence of God. Take a step today to be aflame for the Lord and keep the same fire ever burning and turned on. Remember, IT MUST NOT GO OUT!
prayerPoints: Spend time to fellowship with the Lord today.

days.title: The Holy Spirit & Your Zeal
days.scripture: For it is God who works in you both to will and to do for His good pleasure.
days.body:
Young Ancient, you must be reminded that you can't do this Christian walk alone, no matter how hard you try, you can't do it by your own strength or will.

That's why today's scriptures tell us that "For it is God who works in you to will and to do of His good pleasure. That will to win souls, or to do something for God, is not from your own self but from God Himself and that is why He gave us the Holy Spirit.

The Lord Jesus gave us His Holy Spirit so we depend on the strength He gives, no wonder He is our strengthener (Check out John 14 AMP). When we depend on the Holy Spirit through this Christian walk, that is when we experience supernatural results.

That's why there is a need to fellowship with the Holy Spirit. As we speak in tongues, He feels our desire, as we study the Word of God, He gives us visions that keep us on this path.

Mighty One, never think you can do life alone, it's only with the power of the Holy Ghost that He can fill you with His desire. Fellowship with the Holy Ghost now more than ever. Hallelujah!
prayerPoints: Dear Lord, thank you for the gift of your spirit. Thank you that I am strengthened always. I love you Lord.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Set some time to fellowship today. Do it intentionally and be very conscious of the presence of God at work in you.

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Supernatural: relating to an order of existence beyond the visible observable universe

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: The Spirit of the Lord is the presence of God Himself.- Ps Elliot

days.title: Called to Be a Labourer
days.scripture: So he called ten of his servants, delivered to them ten minas, and said to them, ‘Do business till I come.’
days.body:
Many people fancy the beauty of going to church. Though fellowship with brethren is very pivotal, it doesn't end there. It's even an error to be in the house of God doing nothing.

It's like occupying space at home and never contributing to the progress of the home-no house chores, nor any proper contribution to the home. You realise how much of a nuisance you become if you do nothing.

That's the same thing and more when it comes to God’s house. Your greatest pleasure should be in the expression of your love for the Lord and you do that with this great consciousness of being a labourer. The key verse above clearly states that occupy till the Lord returns and that occupation is in being a labourer. What are you doing for the Lord? How are you offering those works? Are they genuinely from a place of love or are they works from a place of obligation? Remember we were called to be bondservants of the Lord wearing the very purposes and essences of our Lord. Hallelujah!
prayerPoints: Father, today I submit to you and your will. I declare that I have a complete consciousness of what it means to be a labourer. Today I rise and take charge of the place you have called me to be. Thank you for calling me your own. I love and adore you, Lord.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Spend time meditating on today's article over and over again. Let the Words sink deep.

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Pivotal: extremely important

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: The reward for good work is more work.- Ps Elliot

days.title: Labourer , Labour On!
days.scripture: Therefore, my beloved brethren, be steadfast, immovable, always abounding in the work of the Lord, knowing that your labor is not in vain in the Lord.
days.body:
Sigh! There is so much to do for the Lord" Where do I even start from. Stacey spoke under her breathe as she examined her to do list. She had just been appointed Cell Leader for Teens Church and the souls were already tripping in.

"Holy Ghost, this one if you don't help me, I don't know who will"

Young Ancient, the Work of the harvest of souls is enormous. Just think about it. Do you really know what it takes to raise one person and now think about what it means to raise nations and a great number of people? The ministry of the Holy Ghost is the key to your labour! He is the strengthener and guide of your efforts.

When the work seems too much. He is the perfect extraordinary strategist to make all things easy for you. What you need to do is to be conscious of His divine enablement in you. Have you ever thought of what grace truly is? Grace is God's divine enablement at work in you! The very essence of God at work in you! Just think about it!

The Work the Lord has called you to do is His very divine enablement causing you to complete it! He never gives you anything that's beyond you! You need to labour on even when your emotions may not succumb. It's a place of total death to self. Today, rise to the call even more Yes! Go labour on!
prayerPoints: Father, I rise to the call to labour for you! I am a labourer in your house. I declare that my heart and my mind is ever receptive to your voice. Thank you for choosing me! I love you Lord.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: What are the things you find yourself doing for the Lord? How well are you laboring for His course ? These are questions you should ponder on.

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Sigh: To take a deep, audible breath in and out.

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: Let the master come and find that your boots were dirty and your hands in the plow, remember we are bondservants with Christ.-Ps Elliot

days.title: Labourer, Take Flight!
days.scripture: Wisdom calls aloud outside; She raises her voice in the open squares.
days.body:
When you are so burning with God’s vision and passions, there is a certain rate you run with. The vision becomes so burning and enduring in your heart that you are ever willing to take flight concerning the matters of the Lord. This is when the Lord Himself imparts to you speed.

Mighty one, take note, this speed is not a rushed work, it's a quick work to hasten the things to come and the things to be done. This speed is the quickening of the spirit of the Lord from the inside. He is the very force that leads and guides you in all things.

It's a speed to take flight at a very tender age. The Lord is raising and has raised an army of lights. This army of lights knows the essence of having to take flight and take charge. And that's exactly the ministry He has called you into. What are the things the Lord has told you?

What are the visions you are seeing? How ardent are you about those instructions! There is absolutely no time to be delaying with the things the Lord has told you! Now is the time to take flight, spread your wings and fly. There is absolutely no barrier of limitation for a labourer who labours and toils in prayer. Remember the time is now and yours is to take flight.
prayerPoints: Spend time meditatively reading today's article. Map out your life, speak in tongues, and strategize. The Holy Spirit is going to inspire you on many grounds and the places you can take flight.

days.title: Labourer, Stay Alert!
days.scripture: And since you don’t know when that time will come, be on guard! Stay alert!
days.body:
Imagine you are so alert every time, and there is just this one time that you were not alert! Wow! It's just going to cause a lot. Being alert means to be smart and quick ALWAYS! It speaks of the quickness of a labourer who is smart to avert disaster. The major aspect of this quickness is discernment.

In your stead to carry out the Work of God, you need to be extra sensitive to the Lord - discernment is key. As a labourer, you need to have the ability to sight or smell many distances. Whether it is the discernment of time or occurrence, one of the important developments of your Spirit should be geared towards alertmindedness. You should not be caught off guard and you should be self-aware.

Every true labourer is self-aware. Our own enemy here, the devil is often counted, for his 'slippery nature' of 'time' and 'the times'. As the enemy of time, it simply refers to how he is responsible for the quick, zap speed of time we lose in preparing ourselves for the onslaught of the hour. If you aren't alert, he will make you lose time.

You need to be so alert at this time. Labourer keep your watch and take your stance! Don't ever lose guard.
prayerPoints: My world is under my discerning point of view. Nothing escapes me in the name of Jesus. My senses are newly sharpened every time to make out the enemy's attempts to outsmart the age and overcome them.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Get the book “AWAKE’’ to enter deeper insights into what it means to stay alert. Contact 0202519999 or 0559160706

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Zap: to strike suddenly

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: The awake ones are the discerning ones.- Ps Elliot

days.title: Labourer, Gather Other Labourers
days.scripture: And this gospel of the kingdom will be preached in all the world as a witness to all the nations, and then the end will come.
days.body:
And after you have had the consciousness that you are a labourer what next? After you are working in your place what's next? Your role is to raise others!

God has had a desire for men for so long a time what we call the eternal purpose. Something that dumbfounded David so much that He asked the Lord what is man that He is so mindful of. He had his answer. He realised as the book of Psalms (Psalm 67:2) puts this that the Lord had news of His saving power and an eternal plan for mankind.

This eternal plan is for all men to be saved and to come to the knowledge of the person of Jesus Christ and you have a very important role to play as a labourer! Many don't have this consciousness as you do.

For some, they are more concerned about whether they are going to heaven or hell than being concerned about the salvation of souls and even the Kingdom of God. Many haven't come to understand the extent of the work of harvest and you need to give them this vision.

You need to first be so burning with the vision of souls. That has to be your number one concern first! Today make up your mind to be a labourer who raises other labourers. It's a divine soul winning to exponentially grow the Kingdom of God! It's time to expand! We have an evil age to end.
prayerPoints: Dear Lord, I urgently gather labourers to you for this course. As I raise others, I am ever more perfected to see your grand vision on the all-men mandate. Thank you for your love and grace.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Challenge yourself this week. Look for one person you can raise in the things of God and in the knowledge of the Lord Jesus Christ.

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Dumbfounded: extremely shocked

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: Transformation of hearts is the sole purpose of soul-winning. - Ps Elliot

days.title: The Excellent You!
days.scripture: Then this Daniel became distinguished above all the other high officials and satraps, because an excellent spirit was in him. And the king planned to set him over the whole kingdom.
days.body:
Mostly, the highest ranking in an academic institution is "Excellent". Excellence is God's rod for ruling. That explains why when Daniel walked in excellence, he walked in a dimension of ruling. In fact, the King put him in charge of the whole Kingdom.

So far as God has made us Kings, there is a need to be excellent in not just some things but all things! The reason some teens get corrupted is that they haven't learned to distinguish themselves in excellence. Be it the work of God, academics, your very attitude, in fact, everything must be done with excellence. Give it your best shot and do it with your all.

Young Ancient, a half-hearted work is no work at all. Everyone can work for God, but what distinguishes you is how excellently you do it. Rule with excellence today!
prayerPoints: I declare the spirit of excellence is at work in me. I am a man or woman of distinction. I function by the wisdom of God. The world has nothing in me. I increase my horn of excellence and distinction. Hallelujah.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Take today's shout it out 5 more times

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Depraved: morally corrupt, wicked, or lacking in moral principles.

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: Jesus will either be Lord of all, or He will not be Lord at all. -Ps Elliot

days.title: Decide to Be Excellent
days.scripture: Then this Daniel was preferred above the presidents and princes, because an excellent spirit was in him; and the king thought to set him over the whole realm
days.body:
Excellence is adding colour and beauty to something. Excellence is the spirit of God at work in you. The spirit of God is a spirit of excellence. When you got born again, He took complete residence in you. He resides in you.

If you have the consciousness that you can add beauty and colour to everything you put your hands to do, you will realise a massive working of the spirit of the Lord in all that you do. You first need to have an excellent mindset. You don't ever have to put on the garment of complacency. Many people are very okay with substandard results. They live in the deception of "we will make it better another time" but what if that was just your final opportunity to have made that thing excellent? What if that was your only opportunity?

An excellent mindset breeds excellent results. You need to decide to be excellent in all you do. Talk excellence, exude excellence, let everything about you be crisp with excellence. Remember you have an excellent spirit at work in you, live with this consciousness and decide to be ever excellent in all things.
prayerPoints: I am excellent in all I do. The spirit of excellence is at work in me, making me exceptional in all my endeavours. As I live this way, the excellency of God will be displayed from my life to my world.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Take today's shout it out three more times. Make sure you are speaking in tongues as you do this

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Substandard-Shoddy; inferior

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: If you are consciously aware of the nature of the excellency of God's spirit at work in you, you will attract Kings. - Ps Elliot

days.title: Lord Over Everything
days.scripture: Then He said to them all, “If anyone desires to come after Me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross daily, and follow Me.
days.body:
Guess what? The Christian journey is that of total surrender to the Lord Jesus. We are not to be called Christians in order to make a name for ourselves. When the Lord calls us, He bids us to lay all ambitions at His feet and take up our crosses with Him. Don't get it all wrong, that doesn't mean you can't have passions, your passions should be His. Young Ancient, the most destructive result of the fall of man was the desire of man to take upon himself thus, the mandate to become like God. The evil one lured them into believing that if they ate of the tree of the knowledge of good and evil they will be like God; being able to know good from bad. This subsequently led to man's quest of making a name for himself.

Now, when you got born again, this automatically changed. The Christian life is one of total submission to the Lordship of Christ. This is where true fulfillment is discovered. Many who still pursue self-ambition are never fulfilled, for they quest for more of self-worship which they never find. Jesus came to be Lord of all or not at all, there is no middle ground. So as a teenager, your highest purposes are discovered in the total surrender of your entire life to the Lord on a daily basis, where He determines what you do and do not.

This is what the Apostle Paul had discovered, when he declared, "I am crucified with Christ, nevertheless I live yet not I, but Christ lives in me, and the life I live in the flesh, I live for the son of God, who loved me and gave His life for me" (Galatians 2:20). Because He gave His life for our saving, we must in turn live our lives for His purposes in the earth. Live daily with this consciousness, that Christ Jesus wants to be Lord over every area of your life; this is a place of death to self-will and self-ambition. It in this type of living that the glory of God is revealed in your life daily.
prayerPoints: Heavenly Father, My life is laid before You as a living sacrifice. I thank you for the strength and leadings You grant me to daily walk in Your precepts and guidance. Be Lord Over My ALL Today and beyond. Hallelujah!

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Set about 30 minutes aside today. Try to evaluate how well you include God into what you do. Is He really Lord over all?

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Lure: tempting or enticing someone

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: The glory of God is revealed in your life through total surrender to the Lord. - Ps Elliot

days.title: Campus ,Your World of Influence
days.scripture: Yet You made him a little lower than the angels, and crowned him with glory and majesty!
days.body:
According to the Oxford Dictionary, a campus is the buildings of a university or college and the land that surrounds them. In this context, campus refers to your everyday place of influence.

School presents us with a very great opportunity to influence a lot of people with the Gospel. You do have friends you speak to everyday! Attending a class here or there , has it occurred to you that you have such a great opportunity to influence men? As you rise up the ladder, you will realize that campus is one of the most influential places for the Gospel . You may not have as much time on your watch as you do now, now is the time to plan how you will take halls, classes, hostels and cities with the Gospel. Don't assume that people are already Christians, have they heard the message of the Christ and His Government and His soon coming Kingdom?

If they have how urgent are they about it? Where do you find yourself especially with regards to your academic life? Allow the spirit of the Lord to lead you on how to take possession of those lands. Hallelujah!
prayerPoints: Dear Lord, my campus is for your taking and for your glory. Today I dominate and take spheres with the Gospel. My faith is heightened and my mind is receptive to influence. Thank you Lord.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Take some time off today to pray. Pray about the dominance of the Gospel on your campus. Declare that ideas are gravitating to you for this cause. Hallelujah!

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Teleological — Receptive:being open, willing and able to receive

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: You need to have faith for the Gospel. It's a strong dominating faith where you assign and align all places unto the dominance of His Kingdom. - Ps Elliot

days.title: Order Your Day!
days.scripture: So teach us to number our days, That we may gain a heart of wisdom.
days.body:
Class that day started at 8:00am but Stacey was already at her Department at exactly 6:20am. Her friend, Maya had always wondered why she was so keen on getting to the Department early. It wasn't as if she had the keys to the class. "What's with you and getting to the Department hours before time, most punctual?" Maya teasingly questioned. “You again and your observational questions. I have an agenda, I come early to order my day. ”Order your day? Ah, but the day has already started. What do you mean?”

"I speak in tongues and declare into my day within the few minutes before class, and with this, I never have bad days.”

Mighty One, there is a dire need to order your day, maybe unlike Stacey who will go to her Department early, you can wake up early to order your day. Ordering your day is not just about writing a to-do list. It's beyond that. It's about speaking Words into the productivity of your day. Things are not just supposed to happen; you must happen.
prayerPoints: My day is blessed and ordered by you Lord. Today I submit to your guidance throughout the day. I know what to do, how to do it and how to go about it. Hallelujah!

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Draw a consistent plan on how you are going to order your day. Make sure you are intentional and consistent about it.

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Assiduous: marked by careful constant attention or persistent application

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: Things don't just happen to you; you happen. - Ps Elliot

days.title: Where Is Your Mind?
days.scripture: You keep him in perfect peace whose mind is stayed on you, because he trusts in you.
days.body:
After a long day at school, Jason got home, finished his homework and passed the living room to greet his dad right after. His dad had just arrived from work and was intently watching the routine 7pm news.

"Well, let me at least find out what interests dad to be sitting behind the tele every 7pm". Slowly, Jason took his seat and watched along with his dad.

"10 people lost their lives in a car crash”

Jason panicked, "Why is this so and why is dad even watching this?" After 10 minutes, the news headline read again " Earthquakes happening in the Southern part of the World keep many in fear".

Young Ancient, the question for you today is, “Where is your mind?” There is almost always negativity in the news and on social media, there is one bad thing or another happening in different parts of the world. This is because of how dark the world is.

But here is the good news- you choose how it affects you.

We cannot keep focusing on the negative incidents in this world. If we do, we will definitely be part of the misfortune that happens in this world. It's not to say that we don't care about what's happening in the world. Yours is to pray and align all things to the Lord, but most importantly you need to rise above the negativities in this world.

Today, learn to keep your focus on God's Kingdom. As you study God's Word and spend time praying, God places on your heart visions directly from His throne room. This is how you stay free from the troubles of this world. And as you stay free, you introduce others to this perspective of this Kingdom. Today, change your focus to the things of God.
prayerPoints: Father, I declare in the name of the Lord Jesus, that my mind is stayed on you and your Kingdom always. I rise above the negativities of this world. Amen.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Choose one day this week to fast or set aside extra prayer time specifically for your leaders. Write their names down and intercede for them intentionally.

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Perspective: the capacity to view things in their true relations or relative importance

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: When you are so focused on the Lord, it distracts you from paying attention to the negativities in this world. - Ps Elliot

days.title: What Are You Seeking?
days.scripture: But seek first the kingdom of God and His righteousness, and all these things shall be added to you.
days.body:
We are to seek the Kingdom of God as someone who searches for a precious pearl-with passion, determination, and a heart that refuses to give up. This is how every believer is meant to live. Everyone in the faith must seek the Kingdom, because it is the clearest evidence that our hearts and our focus truly belongs to God.

Someone may ask, "Why must we seek the Kingdom?" The answer is simple: we live in a world where the Kingdom of God is not revealed to everyone. It is revealed to those whose hearts genuinely long for it and pursue it with sincerity. God makes Himself known to those who earnestly seek Him.

How then do we seek the Kingdom? We seek it through prayer, through studying and meditating on God's Word, and through obeying everything that He has commanded us to do. These are the ways we demonstrate that our attention and affection are fixed on His Kingdom.

Even if you are young, your future is secure when you seek the Kingdom with all your heart. Every single day, pursue the Kingdom as though you are searching for the greatest treasure you could ever find. That is what sets us apart as God's people. And as we faithfully seek Him, God uses us to bring the reality of His Kingdom to the earth, so that His will is manifested through our lives. Hallelujah!
prayerPoints: Today spend time to seek the Kingdom of God through prayer, fellowship and meditation on God's Word. Do this assiduously.

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Assiduously: with constant careful attention

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: We have been given a mandate to end this evil age through the Proclamation of the Kingdom of God.- Ps Elliot

days.title: Why the Kingdom?
days.scripture: But seek first the kingdom of God and His righteousness, and all these things shall be added to you.
days.body:
We speak so much about the Kingdom because of where our world is heading. If we do not turn our focus toward the Kingdom, or seek it as we are commanded to, then, as we discussed a few days ago, we will be swept away with the world in its troubles, confusion, and misfortunes.

The Kingdom of God has been promised throughout the Scriptures to come upon the earth. That is why Jesus taught us to pray, "Your kingdom come. Your will be done on earth as it is in heaven." God's desire is for His Kingdom to be established on the earth, where His rule and His will are fully manifested.Only those who seek the Kingdom and set their hearts upon it will dwell in it. More than that, they will become part of its very foundation. They will be pillars in God's Kingdom, just as the book of Revelation declares. Therefore, our hearts and minds must continually be fixed on the Kingdom. As we meditate on it, long for it, and live according to its principles, we cultivate an eager expectation for its coming.

The coming of the Kingdom will mark the end of the present evil age and the beginning of God's righteous reign upon the earth. It is the fulfillment of God's eternal purpose-a time when His authority, justice, peace, and glory will be fully established. Therefore, let us seek the Kingdom above all, so that when it is revealed, we will be found ready and counted among those who belong to it. Hallelujah.
prayerPoints: Spend time to pray and meditate on today's article Do you really understand what it means to seek the Kingdom? Plan how you will do this and check your progress as you do.

days.title: Where Is the Kingdom?
days.scripture: And I saw the holy city, the new Jerusalem, coming down from God out of heaven like a bride beautifully dressed for her husband.
days.body:
The Kingdom of God has a physical manifestation. That is exactly what we see in the book of Revelation. The Kingdom of God comes down from heaven, from God Himself, and there will indeed be a physical manifestation and establishment of God's Kingdom on the earth.

However, because we speak about this future physical manifestation, some people assume that the Kingdom of God does not exist today. But that is not true. Jesus taught that the Kingdom of God is not something people can point to and say, "Here it is," or "There it is." Rather, the Kingdom of God is within you.

This means that every believer has a responsibility to live out the Kingdom. We are called to demonstrate its realities and its virtues—love, patience, faith, hope, righteousness, mercy, and peace. Especially in these last days, Christians are called to reveal the nature and character of God's Kingdom to the world.

The Kingdom first reigns in the hearts of those who submit to Christ. As we allow God to rule our lives and as we faithfully display the values of His Kingdom, the world begins to witness its reality. In this way, the Kingdom is manifested through the lives of God's people even now, while we eagerly await its full and visible establishment when Christ returns.

So, the Kingdom is both a present reality and a future hope. It is already within us, and one day it will be fully established over all the earth.

Praise the Lord
prayerPoints: Still on the Kingdom Series, spend time to cherish and meditate on these articles. Go back to the previous dates and meditate on the articles

days.title: Get Ready for His Kingdom
days.scripture: And the Good News about the Kingdom will be preached throughout the whole world, so that all nations will hear it; and then the end will come.
days.body:
In the past few articles, we have learned that we have to live in anticipation of the kingdom. We have to live in expectation of the kingdom. That is how we get ourselves ready. Not only ourselves, but the rest of the world.

There is a life of expectancy for the kingdom you should have, just as the Bible tells us that hastening the coming of the Lord, or other versions will tell us, hurry it along, it’s important we live with this consciousness.

As we pray, what happens is that we are enforcing the will of God in heaven down here on earth. And that is how heaven will be at par with earth. Then the kingdom of God will be established here on earth.

As we win souls, as we evangelize, what happens is that we prepare others for the coming of the kingdom. We are bringing others into the rule of the kingdom of God. And we are aligning their hearts according to the government system of the coming kingdom. And we must also prepare our hearts as laborers in these last days. We must prepare by also studying the Word of God and also staying in fellowship. And as we do that, we are aligning our hearts, and we are aligning every aspect of our lives to the kingdom of God. That is when we will be able to see the kingdom. Praise the Lord!
prayerPoints: Spend time to Meditate on today's article over and over again. Do this meditatively as you prepare for His Kingdom

days.title: The Ancient Landmark
days.scripture: Remember the days of long ago; think about the generation’s past. Ask your father, and he will inform you. Inquire of your elders, and they will tell you.
days.body:
When you begin history class, the teacher writes "Introduction to History" on the board. One of the first questions asked is, "Why do we study history? What is the importance of history?"

The answer is simple: History teaches us where we come from so that we understand our heritage and know the way forward.

The same principle applies to us as believers. We must know our spiritual history. There is a saying that goes, "Those who do not know history are bound to repeat it." If we do not know the history of the Church or understand our spiritual origins, we are likely to repeat the mistakes of the past. At the same time, we may miss the opportunity to learn from the great and glorious things God has done through His people throughout history.

That is why it is important, especially for young believers, to study the history of the Church. Knowing where God has brought His people from helps us understand what He desires to do in and through us today and in the future.

Over the next few days, we will journey through the history of the Church. We will explore the story of God's work among His people and discuss the history of Assemblies of God (A/G), a heritage that is valuable for believers around the world—0including you.
prayerPoints: As we journey through a series of articles on history x makes sure to diligently read and learn from them. Don't just read them, meditate on them, take important notes and pay attention to the spirit of the Lord as He leads you on.

days.title: Reformation
days.scripture: And I will give you shepherds according to My heart, who will feed you with knowledge and understanding
days.body:
Before great and mighty things started happening in the body of Christ, there were some very difficult moments. This period was what we refer to as "the dark ages". Deception and lies were rife in those times in the church. The darkness which was in the world at that time had crept into the church.

During the period of the dark ages, the truth that should have held the church. It was in this period that the papacy, which is the body representing the church at that time, was preying on God's people. The truth in God's Word was either being hidden from them or being twisted. Because the only translation of the Bible was Latin, the church government did not make the people of God have access to other Bible translations. Those times also had the introduction of some deceptive acts into the church. Some of which included the sale of indulgences, confessionals and absolution and most tragic of all was the principal of excommunication.

It was in this era that God started bringing out some of the most powerful voices to shake the church in the war front. John Wycliffe was a main player in this reformation who brought about the translation of scriptures. John Hus, although was burnt at the stake, used his life to fught against simony, the desire of the papacy to make wealth from the people. And the most popular 95 theses which was pinned by Martin Luther which was aimed at questioning the sale of indulgence among others.

Young Ancient, this period of reformation was very vital to wipe out the deception in the church and bring freedom to practise our faith. So when you hold your Bible today, remember all those who fought for the liberty of God's Word.
prayerPoints: I put on the truth of God's Word like a banner. I defend the truth boldly and proclaim it as well. Even though I'm young, I deliver my world from the darkness and deception of our time with the pure and sincere milk of God's Word

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Thinking over today's article is a paramount way to get your faith up! Spend time to read and reread today's article.

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Rife-Common

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: We hold the last baton; our works perfect the works of those that went ahead - Ps Elliot

days.title: Evangelistic Office
days.scripture: And He said to them, “Go into all the world and preach the gospel to every creature.
days.body:
The full purpose or account of Church History was to restore the fivefold office. He started with the pastoral ministry with which the Reformation movement came about. After the work of reformation in the church, He went ahead to work on the evangelistic office. It is with this there was the Evangelistic movement.

The 18th century saw the rise of the evangelistic ministry like it has never been seen. It was in this period the Lord poured His anointing to preach the saving power of Jesus Christ from sin and deliver the people from the moral failure passed on from the dark ages. This move brought a harvest of souls to the Kingdom as the Lord also sent many of these evangelists to be missionaries all over the world.

This era of evangelism gave rise to names such as Count Ludwig Von Zinzendorf who established a prayer village called HERRNHUT meaning "Under the Lord's Watch" in Germany. There were also voices John and Charles Wesley, the founding fathers of the Methodist movement, Jonathan Edwards, George Whitefield and David Brainerd. All these and many more gallant soldiers of the faith travelled the length and breath of this world in order to preach the salvation message of Jesus Christ. They did this so that one day, you will get the chance and freedom to also evangelise our world. You must therefore leverage on your history in order to make an impact in your world.
prayerPoints: I have the essence of my faith history in my heart. As I go out to win my world, the sacrifices of all our fathers and mothers in the faith will come alive and make sense. I will be the one to preserve their heritag.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Get a copy of the Book Church History. Visit the New Jerusalem app store to order a copy today

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Leverage-to use something that you already have in order to achieve something new or better.

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: God gave us a moving evangelical ministry to send the message of the Kingdom out there to all peoples - Ps Elliot

days.title: Healing &Pentecostal Era
days.scripture: And these signs will follow those who believe: In My name they will cast out demons; they will speak with new tongues; [18] they will take up serpents; and if they drink anything deadly, it will by no means hurt them; they will lay hands on the sick, and they will recover.”
days.body:
Before Jesus ascended, He assured us that signs and wonders shall follow those of us who believe. These works started immediately after Jesus left the earth with the disciples experiencing the move of the Holy Spirit and the miraculous. But as we learnt some days ago, the dark ages robbed the church of such glorious moments. So God, in the business of restoring the church, brought about the Healings and Pentecostal move.

This was the period of the restoration of divine truths as well as the introduction of truths to the body of Christ. This era featured an introduction of the ministry of healing and miracles on a very large scale as well as the demonstration of the Holy Spirit in a unique way. It was to this we can credit the Welsh Revival of 1904 and the Azusa Street Revival of 1906. We also see voices such as Alexander Dowie, Maria Woodworth Etter, John G. Lake and George Jeffreys.

This era cemented the truth of the manifestation of the Holy Spirit through signs and wonders. This will also be true for you if you acknowledge what our fathers and mothers did in their day. What are you doing in your day today? Think on these thing.
prayerPoints: Just as my elders in the faith lived in the realm of miracles, I also live in that same atmosphere and even greater. I speak with new tongues, I cast out devils, I heal the sick and I raise the dead. As I do, I also teaches others to live in this same reality. Hallelujah!

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Take today's shout it out 3 more times

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Cement-to bind, secure, or make an agreement or relationship permanent and unlikely to change.

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: We are in the last days and the baton has been handed down from Generation to generation earning us the place as the last warriors of the Lord Jesus Christ - Ps Elliot

days.title: Word of Faith
days.scripture: Now faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen.
days.body:
Mighty One, as we learnt some days ago, following the Dark Ages, the ministry of the gospel was restored to the Church. The first emphasis was the restoration of the ministry of the Word, as erroneous teachings that had been promoted by the institutional church were corrected through the preaching of biblical truth.

The next ministry the Lord restored was the evangelistic ministry. Evangelists went out to preach the message of salvation, resulting in a great harvest of new converts. This movement also included the healing ministry of Jesus Christ, demonstrated through many evangelistic outreaches.

Later, during the Word of Faith and Charismatic movements, the teaching ministry began to be restored more fully. Believers were taught foundational biblical truths, including their authority in Christ, faith, healing, and victorious Christian living.

In the Word of Faith movement, believers were taught that they could receive healing for their own selves, even on their sick beds. There was also the message that healing was an inheritance for the Christian. The Word of Faith movement did not only end with healing. Other subjects, including prosperity, came to play. Also, the teaching on the authority of believers began to become prominent to this ministry. It was the Word of Faith and charismatic movements that gave birth to voices such as E.W. Kenyon, Kenneth Hagin, and Lester Sumrall. So with this, we can see that those who went ahead of us paved the way for us to also experience our faith in God in a certain type, the faith that will overcome the world and the faith that will bring in the coming of Jesus. Hallelujah
prayerPoints: Challenge yourself today to use your faith. Its from faith in this season and beyond. Use your faith for Big things for the Lord. The word always when you do it in the lens of faith.

days.title: Precious Fruits of the Earth
days.scripture: For truly I tell you, until heaven and earth disappear, not the smallest letter, not the least stroke of a pen, will by any means disappear from the Law until everything is accomplished.
days.body:
When studying church history, the prophetic path or the prophetic outcome of whatever has happened in the church age, Miss Wigglesworth, when Smith Wigglesworth in the year 1959, gave a prophecy to Lester Summerall while he was 88 and Lester Summerall was 26. And he said, I probably won't see you again now. My job is almost finished.

As he continued to pray, he cried, I see it, I see it. Brother Summerall asked, what do you see, what do you see, brother? He said, I see a healing revival coming right after World War II, . It will be so easy to get people healed. I see it, I see it. I won't be here for it, but you will be. He continued to prophesy, I see another one. I see people of all different denominations being filled with the Holy Ghost. Then Brother Wigglesworth continued, I see another move of God. I see auditoriums full of people coming with notebooks. There will be a wave of teaching on faith and healing. Then he prophesied. After that, he started sobbing. I see the last day revival that is going to usher in the precious age of the end. It will be the greatest revival this world has ever seen. It's going to be a wave of the gifts of the Spirit.

The ministry gifts will be flowing on this planet Earth. I see hospitals being emptied out, and they'll bring the sick churches where they'll allow the Holy Ghost to move. This is an amazing prophecy, and even though this is an amazing prophecy, we should take careful consideration the details of this prophecy.

...to be Continued

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Approach every task, no matter how small, as a serious training ground for God's purposes. Let each action be an opportunity to grow, refine, and excel for His glory.

days.title: Precious Fruits of the Earth II
days.scripture: For truly I tell you, until heaven and earth disappear, not the smallest letter, not the least stroke of a pen, will by any means disappear from the Law until everything is accomplished.
days.body:
For many of the historical moves of God we have looked at, coupled with some of the amazing blessings that we know, it can be expected of something much more and exciting that we have witnessed. An army is currently forming that will unleash the greatest powers ever seen in the presentation of the move of God to all of what we have witnessed from the historical moves of God. All the moves of God Smith Wigglesworth prophesied about, starting in 1945, have taken place as we discussed, except for the last one, which we are about to witness.

This coming move of God is going to be the greatest event ever recorded in the history of the Earth. It will break every denominational boundary and will cut across every nation on Earth. Many revivals will take place in this era, but this itself is bigger than the revival.

It will be a divine awakening and the summation of all ages. Young Ancient , after you have heard this, what should be your resolve? You should be willing enough to count yourself a part of prophecy, just as the fathers of faith, the fathers and mothers of faith, signed up their lives to make history in their time. We should also align ourselves so that we bring the prophecy that has been given to the church in this time to pass.

Praise the Lord.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Revisit the first article and reread today's article. Spend time to meditate and think on the things that were spoken of

days.title: The Gospel, Your Everyday
days.scripture: And the Good News about the Kingdom will be preached throughout the whole world, so that all nations will hear it; and then the end will come
days.body:
The greatest assignment you can come to understand and realise is the Gospel , specifically the Gospel of the Kingdom.

Maybe it hasn't occurred to you that much but don't assume that everyone is saved. Don't assume that everyone has heard the message of Transformation. There are still more people out there who need to transcend from just being conscious about the Love and salvation of the Lord Jesus to knowing the Kingdom of God and its establishment.

That's your greatest assignment Mighty One , everyday you step out of the doors of your home, hall or school to carry out your daily duties, let this be your greatest consciousness. Think on the things above , think about that one great assignment you must fulfill.

Yes, let your life revolve around you around the entirety of the Gospel because we were called bondservants with the Lord. Hallelujah

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Declare boldness to preach the Gospel and send His word to many. Declare that you are bold on all grounds.

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Cogitations :Meditations

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: When the Lord called us, He bid us to come and die, our greatest assignment is to see the Kingdom of God established .- Ps Elliot

days.title: Be Not Ashamed
days.scripture: For God has not given us a spirit of fear and timidity, but of power, love, and self-discipline.
days.body:
Shyness is a feeling of apprehension, lack of confidence, or awkwardness, especially when a person is around others. Shyness usually stems from fear. It is studied to be a common emotional change in adolescence. It's a common trait that can manifest in different ways and to varying degrees.

For some, it might be a minor inconvenience, while for others, it can significantly impact their social interactions and daily life... Stacey listened intently to her Social Science teacher. Before class that morning, she was reading an important truth on confidence.

The Spirit of fear is clearly not from God. And since shyness stems from fear, it means being shy is not from him. To stand in front of a crowd to deliver a speech is seen as a great deal. Some easily shy away from proclaiming the Gospel because of the shyness that lurks in their heart.

Young Ancient, Jesus was never ashamed to do anything he did. In fact, as he was whipped, spat upon and carried the cross. He did it with you in mind. The ball lies in your court to tell others of this great news. Will you allow shyness to be the obstacle here? Let them say, let them call you all sort of names. Be ever confident about the Gospel and proclaim it with all boldness. The Holy Ghost is going to imprint ideas on your heart as to how to boldly confess and love His Word. Refuse to be shy o YE MIGHTY ONE!

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Reach out to at least two people today, share God's Word but most importantly make sure you are talking to them about his zoom coming Kingdom.

days.title: Check Your Words
days.scripture: And I tell you this, you must give an account on judgment day for every idle word you speak
days.body:
Mostly, we jokingly say all these and more. Did you pay attention to the scripture above? We will surely give account of every careless word. ( Emphasis on careless).

These forces emanate from the heart and are the very reasons God will hold everyone accountable for their words. Because these words either preserve the memory of good in the earth or preserve the memory of evil. Young Ancient, the battle of the ages is really a battle between the harvests of all good versus all evil.

Is it not a great privilege that as believers, we actually have the choice and opportunity to put evil and darkness in check by the choice of our words? We hold the responsibility of preserving the memory of good and not using decaying words of evil. For instance, you should learn to use words that testify of God's glory in your life, or even that testify of Jesus and His resurrection in very basic conversations.

For example, if you are to meet someone who's unhappy, you could tell them, “I see God's glory in your life, regardless of what you're going through.” Just by such a statement, you have broken the advance Satan was having over that person through sadness. The person may not react positively or immediately, but you have cut the poison that was fast spreading in their heart with your words . Your words are tools of creation.Ensure you are always using the right words.
prayerPoints: The virtues of God reside in the castle of my heart. I'm a fountain and fortress of glory, springing them out in my words. Hallelujah

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Spend time affirming the above words over and over again

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: Trample: tread on and crush

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: Words are vehicles that define the intents of one's heart. -Ps Elliot

days.title: Be Intentional About Meditation
days.scripture: And I tell you this, you must give an account on judgment day for every idle word you speak
days.body:
Meditation is not passive; it is a divine incubation where eternity meets time. When you meditate on the Word, you engage in a spiritual phenomenon where revelation is distilled and impartation becomes inevitable. You are not merely reading a verse; you are brooding over the very breath of God. Meditation causes the Word to be assimilated into your inner consciousness until it transforms you from within.

Like a hen that sits silently but purposefully over her eggs until life bursts forth, you are called to linger over the Word until divine realities emerge alive and active in your being. In the stillness of meditation, spiritual conception happens. You begin to carry the essence of what you've read, not just as knowledge, but as truth actively shaping your thoughts, decisions, and expressions.

Young Ancient, how much of the Word have you assimilated? How deeply have you brooded? What truths have you allowed to gestate until they became your default response to life? Prosperity in your walk, success in your assignment, clarity in your identity, all flow from this sacred place of sustained meditation.

Don’t just glance at the Word. Dwell, muse, reflect and soak. Let your inner world become a fertile ground where the Word finds no resistance. Meditate until you see, until you hear, until you are completely transformed. Go deeper today, and deeper again tomorrow.
prayerPoints: I meditate day and night! My heart is fertile ground for the Word. I birth the divine will of God in every area of my life. I am transformed by the Word I carry. I prosper and succeed because I live in continual meditation.

otherSections.label: Act
otherSections.content: Choose one verse of Scripture today. Write it out. Speak it aloud several times. Close your eyes and see it until it paints pictures in your mind. Journal what you perceive in your spirit after. Repeat this

otherSections.label: Vocabulary Hunt
otherSections.content: To absorb and fully understand information, ideas, or culture so deeply that it becomes a part of you.

otherSections.label: Quote
otherSections.content: Meditation must be your hotbed. -Ps Elliot
